ingredients: ¼ cup water (or more if needed)
procedure: Mix together the flour, pepper, cumin, and salt.
Add water and knead the dough until it is smooth. You may have to add some water, depending on the flour.
Roll out one ball at a time to a very thin round layer on a slightly oiled surface.
Dry the papadams in the oven for an hour (at about 100°C or 200°F).
Keep them in an airtight container.
Fry the papadams in oil until they are crispy but not too brown.
